zenith.otpClickHint: 👆 Tap the code to verify your account automatically.
zenith.otpValidityHint: This code is valid for 15 minutes. If nothing works, enter the 6 digits manually.

recovery.subject: Reset your REPUTEXA password
recovery.title: Reset your password
recovery.introP1: You requested a password reset. Click the button below to choose a new one.
recovery.introP2: This link is valid for 1 hour. If you did not request this, you can ignore this email.

verifySignup.subject: Confirm your REPUTEXA account
verifySignup.title: Confirm your email address
verifySignup.bodyOtpP1: Welcome! Here is your verification code to activate your REPUTEXA account.
verifySignup.bodyOtpP2: This code is valid for 15 minutes. If you did not create an account, ignore this email.
verifySignup.bodyMagicP1: Welcome! Click the button below to activate your REPUTEXA account.
verifySignup.bodyMagicP2: This link is valid for 24 hours. If you did not create an account, ignore this email.

emailChange.subject: Confirm your new REPUTEXA email
emailChange.title: Confirm your new email
emailChange.introP1: You asked to change your email address. Click the button below to confirm your new address.
emailChange.introP2: This link is valid for 24 hours. If you did not request this, ignore this email and your address will stay the same.

api.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute.
api.signupAccountExists: This account already exists. Please sign in or use another email.
api.signupOtpFailed: Could not create the verification code.
api.resendNoPending: No pending code for this email. Check the address, or wait a few seconds and try again if you just created your account.
api.emailSessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
api.emailSameAsCurrent: The new address is the same as your current address.
api.emailConfirmSendFailed: Could not send the confirmation email. Please try again in a moment.

ConfirmEmailPage.verifyTimeoutToast: Verification is taking too long. Try again or sign in.
ConfirmEmailPage.accountActivatedToast: Account activated! Sign in with your email and password.
ConfirmEmailPage.verifyTooLong: Verification took too long. Try again.
ConfirmEmailPage.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
ConfirmEmailPage.consentSaveError: Could not save consent. Try again.
ConfirmEmailPage.checkoutErrorToast: Could not start checkout. Try again.
ConfirmEmailPage.stripeTimeout: Connecting to Stripe took too long. Try again.
ConfirmEmailPage.stripeNetworkError: Network error while connecting to Stripe. Try again.
ConfirmEmailPage.consentSubtitle: Your email is confirmed. Accept the terms below to continue to secure payment.
ConfirmEmailPage.zenithGdprCheckbox: I confirm that I have informed my customers that their data may be shared with Reputexa for review collection requests, in line with applicable data protection law.
ConfirmEmailPage.needCguCheckbox: Please accept the terms to continue.
ConfirmEmailPage.needZenithCheckbox: Please confirm the Zenith disclosure to continue.
ConfirmEmailPage.footerStripeNote: Secure payment via Stripe. Reputexa never stores your card details.
ConfirmEmailPage.otpSubtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to your email.
ConfirmEmailPage.spamHint: Didn’t receive it? Check your spam folder.
ConfirmEmailPage.resendSuccessToast: A new code has been sent.

ResetPasswordPage.invalidDescription: This reset link has expired or was already used. Request a new one.
ResetPasswordPage.title: New password
ResetPasswordPage.subtitle: Choose a strong password.
ResetPasswordPage.successToast: Password updated. You can sign in.
ResetPasswordPage.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while resetting your password.
ResetPasswordPage.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters.
